privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'L_Shape.inp', which the description claims is a 'real L-shaped commercial building'. However, the file contents (e.g., 'ShellWiz' and 'HVACWiz' components) explicitly indicate it is a synthetic model generated via the eQUEST Building Creation Wizard. The model correctly contains HVAC zones across four floors (Basement/Underground, Ground, Middle, Top) served by Packaged Single Zone (PSZ) systems. The target zone 'South Perim Zn (BB.S1)' is indeed the control zone for system 'Sys1 (PSZ) (BB.C1)' and has an initial DESIGN-COOL-T of 75°F. No metadata field exists in task.json to verify.
